creator: aaron@lo-res.org
text:
build currently new port kdebase 2.2.1, kdelibs 2.2.1, kdenetwork 2.2.1
	(and all the other nice standard kde ports)

        install them

        start kmail

        open a mail which was either signed or encrypted. I use GnuPG
        1.0.6 as underlying pgp program for the kpgp lib.

        --> kmail will hang indefinitely.
